description: Inventory of governance surfaces outside repo control that influence Hermes/Zera behavior

external_surfaces.influence: Controls Hermes runtime behavior, model selection, MCP connections
external_surfaces.risk: medium — drift between repo intent and actual Hermes behavior
external_surfaces.recommended_action: Import critical fields into repo-governed config or add doctor check

external_surfaces.influence: Controls MCP server connections for Gemini runtime
external_surfaces.risk: medium — MCP surface diverges from repo declaration
external_surfaces.recommended_action: Document as external dependency; add parity check to swarmctl.py doctor

external_surfaces.influence: Defines scheduled Zera behavior (self-evolution, intelligence gathering)
external_surfaces.risk: high — active behavior outside repo governance, cannot audit or block
external_surfaces.recommended_action: Import into configs/tooling/background_jobs.yaml or quarantine with documentation
Catalog each job; decide import vs. quarantine

external_surfaces.influence: Actual Zera persona content loaded by LLM (vs. repo docs that are governance-only)
external_surfaces.risk: critical — persona behavior depends on this, not on repo docs
external_surfaces.recommended_action: Either import into runtime prompt assembly or explicitly document as source-of-truth

repo_governed_equivalents.~/.hermes/profiles/zera/system_prompt.md: configs/personas/zera/*.md (but these are NOT loaded at runtime)

drift_summary.sync_coverage: partial — only Hermes has advisory sync, others have none
